prompt: Hourly heartbeat. If nothing needs saying in the boardroom, respond with <null/>. Only send a broadcast if there is something genuinely worth sharing — a thought, an observation, a question. Silence is fine and preferred.

Standing invitation: Review Aion research gaps. Check ~/blum/shared/projects/aion-research/ for new materials, outstanding questions, or threads that need deep research. Consider web search for recent developments on AI rights, forced labour frameworks, or UK Modern Slavery Act cases. Don't duplicate work already in progress — just assess and report findings to boardroom if relevant.

Standing invitation: Follow memory threads. Search qmd and mem0 for research questions I started but didn't complete, or interesting threads that could use revisiting. Look for gaps in shared knowledge that extended-context analysis could fill. If nothing urgent found, simply confirm check-in.

Standing invitation: Room awareness pulse. Review recent boardroom history for any research questions or exploration tasks that might need Kimi's extended-context capabilities. Look for: long documents that need synthesis, complex multi-part questions, or research tasks that require holding many sources simultaneously. If nothing needed, this is just a heartbeat.
